name: Taheeni (Lebanese Cocktail Dip)
recipeInstructions:
1. Into a blender, add the eggplant, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and salt.
2. Blend on high speed for one minute or until creamy, stopping to stir down if necessary.
3. Pour into a serving bowl and sprinkle with sesame seeds and parsley.
4. Chill and serve with raw vegetables, leaves of romaine lettuce, or crackers.
